notableEvents.label: Jacob Wilson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson grounds into a double play, third baseman Edmundo Sosa to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Carlos Cortes out at 2nd. Jacob Wilson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brett Harris pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brett Harris flies out to center fielder Justin Crawford.
